testimony: Vivian手里正拿着那把枪，她一定刚刚杀了Webb先生。
Vivian was holding that gun and must have just killed Mr. Webb.
truth: 只看见Vivian手里拿着枪，并没有亲眼看见她开枪；而这把枪没有硝烟反应。
Only saw Vivian holding the gun; did not actually see her fire it, and the gun showed no gunshot residue.

testimony: 11点半枪响时，Webb先生会客室里只有Gray小姐；今晚没有其他枪响。
At the 11:30 gunshot, only Miss Gray was in Mr. Webb's parlor; there were no other gunshots that night.
truth: 23:30那声不是案发枪声；真实枪击早于23:20。
The 23:30 shot was not the murder shot; the real shooting happened before 23:20.

testimony: 蓝月亮酒吧的清洁工。
Cleaner at the Blue Moon Cabaret.
23:20左右去侧巷倒过一次垃圾，之后回到走廊。
Went to the side alley around 23:20 to take out trash, then returned to the corridor.
搜查后确认：现场没有其他枪，也没有找到弹壳。
After searching the scene, no other gun and no shell casing were found.
子弹射穿Webb后继续飞行，击中了会客室窗户。
The bullet passed through Webb and struck the parlor window.
Vivian有杀人动机，手里拿着凶器，还有认罪证言，应立刻逮捕。
Vivian had motive, weapon, and confession, so she should be arrested immediately.
truth: Vivian的手枪不是杀死Webb的凶器。
Vivian’s gun was not the weapon that killed Webb.
shortTruth: Vivian’s gun was not the weapon

testimony: 蓝月亮除了私酒之外没有别的交易。
The Blue Moon had no business beyond bootlegging.
truth: 蓝月亮还牵涉Webb和“鲸鱼”的勒索生意。
The Blue Moon was also tied to Webb and Whale’s extortion business.

testimony: 23:30听到一声枪响，方向在厨房和会客室一带。
At 23:30, heard one gunshot from the kitchen/parlor side.
负责蓝月亮的账目、排班、库存和日常运转。
Handles the Blue Moon accounts, shifts, inventory, and daily operations.
Rita很可疑：她常来点马提尼却不喝，总盯着会客室走廊。
Rita is suspicious: she often orders martinis without drinking them and watches the parlor corridor.
知道“鲸鱼”的人，除了Webb和Tommy，只剩后来接手勒索的人。
The only people who knew Whale were Webb, Tommy, and whoever later took over the blackmail work.
蓝月亮酒吧的歌女。
Singer at the Blue Moon Cabaret.
Webb把Vivian变成勒索别人的诱饵。
Webb turned Vivian into bait for extortion.
每晚23:30按惯例给Webb送酒。
Every night at 23:30, brings Webb his drink as usual.
坚持声称自己开枪杀了Webb。
Insisted on having shot and killed Webb.
23:05在会客室门口听到“Don’t be bothering me!”后退走。
At 23:05, heard “Don’t be bothering me!” at the parlor door and backed away.
《艾斯弗德狂想曲》是特意求乐队换的，鼓点能传进会客室。
Asked the band to switch to Ashford Rhapsody, whose drumbeats can carry into the parlor.
不知道“鲸鱼”是谁，也没接触过他。
Does not know who Whale is and has never contacted him.
最近很缺钱，家里日子不好过。
Recently short of money, with the household in a hard place.
Vivian也是被逼到没有选择的人。
Vivian was also pushed into having no real choice.
蓝月亮酒吧的兼职主厨。
Part-time chef at the Blue Moon Cabaret.
只负责烧掉前厅送来的废纸；节目单是因为印错才烧。
Only burns waste paper from the front hall; the program sheets were burned because of a printing mistake.
常说“Don’t be bothering me!”。
Often says “Don’t be bothering me!”
23:30枪响时，自己已经回到二楼厨房。
At the 23:30 gunshot, was already back in the second-floor kitchen.
truth: 23:30 的枪声被鼓点掩盖，二楼厨房不在场证明不成立。
The 23:30 gunshot was masked by the drums, so the second-floor kitchen alibi does not hold.
shortTruth: 厨房不在场证明不成立

testimony: 孩子快出生了，家里需要一大笔钱和合法身份文件。
The child is due soon, and the family needs a large sum of money and legal identity papers.
James O’Sullivan的妻子。
James O’Sullivan’s wife.
二十二分局警察，蓝月亮所在片区归他管。
A 22nd Precinct police officer who says the Blue Moon district is under his watch.
